tagline: Find bad websites. Close more deals.

criteria.filter: FU3='New' OR Judge Score >= 7, has website

leads.services: web development, mobile development, UI/UX design, eCommerce, custom software
leads.script_60s:
Hey mobile dev team, it's time for a 60-second website audit!

I just checked out https://trimwebsolutions.com. Here's what I found:

Their website has critical problems: HTTP Error 500 - Internal Server Error and Site completely unreachable. Overall, I'd rate their web presence a 10 out of 10.

As a web development, mobile development, UI/UX design, company, their digital storefront is losing them clients right now. The first impression prospects get? It's not great.

Here's the good news: this is exactly the kind of fix we can knock out this week. A modern, fast, mobile-responsive site with clear calls-to-action would completely transform their pipeline.

Their pain point is: they need better web presence to win more deals.

This is a warm lead, not a cold one. They're actively looking for help. Let's reach out before their competitors get to them first.

Who's drafting the email? Let's close this one!
leads.video_html:
Trimwebsolutions
https://trimwebsolutions.com
CRITICAL
  • HTTP Error 500 - Internal Server Error
  • Site completely unreachable
10/10
Website Score
NanoSoft Audit System
Personalized outreach opportunity
